The '''''Ronto''-class transport''' was a blocky cargo vessel built by [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian Manufacturing Corporation]]. ''Ronto''-class transports were equipped with at least one dorsal and one ventral [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turret and one escape pod. Their hull could be dented by a [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Verpine shatter gun|shatter gun]], and they had an extremely simple flight deck with a very small viewport. ''Rontos'' were considered to be among the slowest, ugliest, and most inefficient ships of the light transport classification in [[36 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}
